---
id: compare-metrics
title: "Retrieve metrics for txn comparison"
description: "Retrieve metrics for txn comparison which is done by by comparing metrics from ES. This API is being called by Satellite."
sidebar_label: "Retrieve metrics for txn comparison"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve metrics for txn comparison"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/b/api/v1/publisher/compare/metrics/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve metrics for txn comparison which is done by by comparing metrics from ES. This API is being called by Satellite.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"header","name":"Authorization","schema":{"type":"string","default":"Bearer eyJhbG..."},"description":"Bearer token to be provided for authentication.","required":true},{"in":"header","name":"X-Service-ID","schema":{"type":"string","default":"service.name.dev"},"description":"Keycloak realm to be provided for authentication.","required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{}},"examples":{"Metrics":{"value":{"created":{"amount":11.63,"count":2},"paid":{"amount":94,"count":23}}}}}},"description":""},"400":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"detail":{"type":"string"}},"required":["detail"],"title":"GenericErrorMessage"}}},"description":""},"401":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"detail":{"type":"string"}},"required":["detail"],"title":"GenericErrorMessage"}}},"description":""},"403":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"detail":{"type":"string"}},"required":["detail"],"title":"GenericErrorMessage"}}},"description":""}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
